Populates a CollegeBean from request parameters.

Populates a CollegeBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseCtl
Populates a CourseBean from request parameters and fills audit information by calling BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

Populates a CourseBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.

Populates a FacultyBean from request parameters and fills audit fields via BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

Populates a FacultyBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ForgetPasswordCtl
Populates a UserBean with the login (email) parameter from the request.

Populates a MarksheetBean from the request parameters.

populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.LoginCtl
Populates a UserBean with credentials from the request.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetCtl
Populates a MarksheetBean from request parameters including optional conversion of marks to Integer and sets audit fields by calling BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

Populates a MarksheetBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.

Populates a UserBean from request parameters and sets audit fields via BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

Populates a RoleBean from request parameters for search or other operations.

Populates a StudentBean from request parameters and fills audit information via BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

Populates a StudentBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.

Populates a SubjectBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.

Populates a UserBean from registration form parameters.
populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Populates audit fields of the DTO such as createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDatetime, and modifiedDatetime.
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.AnnounceListCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BroadcastListCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.EmiCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.EmiListCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.GymworkoutListCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TrackingListCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ArtCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ArtListCtl
 
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Preloads required data before loading the view.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeListCtl
Preloads the list of colleges and sets it as request attribute "collegeList".
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseListCtl
Preloads the list of courses and sets it as request attribute "courseList".
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FacultyCtl
Preloads lists required by the view: collegeList, subjectList and courseList.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetCtl
Preloads the list of students and sets it as request attribute "studentList" for dropdown rendering.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.RoleListCtl
Preloads the list of roles and sets it as request attribute "roleList".
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.StudentCtl
Preloads the list of colleges and sets it as request attribute "collegeList" so that the student form can render a college dropdown.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.SubjectCtl
Preloads the list of courses and sets it as request attribute "courseList" so the subject form can render a course dropdown.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.SubjectListCtl
Preloads subject and course lists and sets them as request attributes ("subjectList", "courseList") for dropdowns or auxiliary displays in the view.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableCtl
Preloads subject and course lists into request attributes for rendering dropdowns on the timetable form.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableListCtl
Preloads subject and course lists into request attributes for rendering dropdowns on the timetable list page.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserCtl
Preloads role list and sets it as request attribute "roleList" for the user form (role dropdown).
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserListCtl
Preloads role list and sets it as request attribute "roleList" for the user list view so role filters/dropdowns can be populated.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserRegistrationCtl
